label: Firmware Firebase Backend
info: Kiosk-facing firmware metadata endpoints. Preserves existing Besiter/FOTA response shape {code,type,data,msg,time}; data is filename,size,url. Proxies active release lookup to Firebase function firmware_httpResolveRelease.

name: Optional: set flow.firmwareResolveUrl / flow.firmwareTargetAliases / flow.firmwarePublicBaseUrl.
info:
Default URL: https://us-central1-node-red-alerts.cloudfunctions.net/firmware_httpResolveRelease
Expected function input: POST {"data":{"target":"mcu"|"12B"|"12M"}}
Expected function result payload can be either {result:{code,type,data,msg,time}} or {code,type,data,msg,time}.

This flow now returns a short Node-RED firmware URL to the kiosk by default and proxies the Firebase signed download server-side. Set flow.firmwarePublicBaseUrl to the externally reachable Node-RED base URL, for example http://34.56.244.66:1880. If unset, the flow uses the incoming Host header. Set flow.firmwareUseLocalProxy to false to return the original Firebase signed URL directly.

Target aliasing is off by default, so /12M resolves the 12M channel and /12B resolves the 12B channel. If Besiter confirms /12M requests should receive the 12B package, set flow.set('firmwareTargetAliases', {"12M":"12B"}).

name: Build Firebase resolver request
Return kiosk firmware metadata
Return firmware error
Build proxy download request
Build download from resolved release
Return proxied firmware file
Return proxy firmware error
